title: Feed Items
description: A single article/link saved to the user's personal reading feed, with an optional summary and a read/unread flag.

title.description: headline shown in the feed list

url.description: the source link this feed item points to

summary.description: short one-paragraph summary shown under the title

read.description: whether the user has marked this item read

createdAt.description: when this item was added to the feed
